title: Hello, This Is My Lab
excerpt: This site is a living documentation of how I think, build, and break things. Not a portfolio — a lab notebook.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const o={em:"em",h2:"h2",p:"p",strong:"strong",...i.components};return t(e,{children:[n(o.p,{children:"I've been meaning to build this for a long time."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:['Not another developer portfolio. Not a "10 things I learned this year" blog. Something closer to a ',n(o.strong,{children:"lab notebook"})," — a public record of the work, the thinking, and sometimes, the mess in between."]}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"Who this is for"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Primarily for me. If you find value here, that's a bonus."}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"I write to think clearly. When I explain something — a system, a concept, a decision — I understand it better. This site is the discipline of doing that in public."}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"What you'll find here"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Articles"})," — Long-form essays on AI, systems, and building. The kind of thinking that takes more than a tweet and less than a research paper."]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Perspectives"})," — Shorter, more opinionated. A position I'm willing to defend. Sometimes contested."]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Projects"})," — Not a list of GitHub repos. Case studies of the things I've actually built: what I was thinking, what broke, what I learned."]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Docs"})," — Technical notes for my own reference. Published in case they're useful to you too."]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Resources"})," — A curated list. Every link has a reason for being here."]}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"On writing style"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"I prefer direct sentences. I'll tell you what I think, not what "it could be argued." If I'm uncertain, I'll say so."}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"I also believe that restraint is a design choice. This site won't have comment sections, likes, or a following count. It's not optimized for engagement — it's optimized for thinking."}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"On the design"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:["This site is built on a Wabi-Sabi philosophy: imperfection-as-intention. The ruled paper background, the ink tones, the serif type — these are choices, not defaults. A researcher's notebook should ",n(o.em,{children:"feel"})," like a researcher's notebook."]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Welcome to the lab."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
